parents.subject: LU-12355 ldiskfs: bio_phys_segments symbol is not exported

commit.subject: LU-12392 utils: specify correct size for the buffer
commit.message:
LU-12392 utils: specify correct size for the buffer

otherwise gcc8 makes a warning which interrupts build.
